title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: 1. **High**: Role trust hardening is not universal. `verifyAccessToken` still returns JWT-embedded `role` with no D1 revalidation, so any caller that authorizes off payload role can bypass the repair’s DB role/is_active guarantees ([jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):171-200). 2. **High**: Refresh-token rotation is non-atomic (`verify -> revoke -> issue`), so concurrent reuse of the same refresh token can mint multiple new valid refresh tokens (replay window) ([jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):267-283, [jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):212-240). 3. **High**: `getUserRole` does not check `is_active`; it can return a role for deactivated users, creating production risk if callers use it for token issuance/authorization decisions instead of `getUserAuthState` ([jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):357-368, [jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):378-397). 4. **Medium**: D1 lookup failures in `getUserAuthState` are mapped to auth failure (“inactive or not found”), which is fail-closed for security but can turn DB incidents into indistinguishable 401s (operationally risky, harder incident triage) ([jwt-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts):398-427). 5. **Medium**: Test coverage is too narrow for production auth risk: only 2 tests for role override + inactive rejection; no tests for refresh revocation/rotation race, D1 error handling, or direct-role-trust misuse paths ([jwt-auth.test.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.test.ts):37-68).
